commits.name: Commit-0
commits.content:
import cv2
import sys

idx = int(sys.argv[1])  # 从命令行读 index
print(f"🎥 Testing camera index {idx}")

cap = cv2.VideoCapture(idx)

if not cap.isOpened():
    print("❌ Failed to open camera")
    exit()

while True:
    ret, frame = cap.read()
    if not ret:
        break

    cv2.imshow(f"Camera {idx}", frame)

    if cv2.waitKey(1) & 0xFF == ord('q'):
        break

cap.release()
cv2.destroyAllWindows()
